Video.summary: Cynthia says her two teen daughters are sexually active and out of control. She worries their actions will lead them to an early grave.
Video.title: I'm 15 and I Love Sex

Video.summary: Because of messages Dashana found on social media and her new boyfriend's phone, she suspects he is cheating; Richard says his girlfriend's family found her in bed with another man and forced her to tell him; Sean sets up cameras to spy on his wife.
Video.title: Shocking Cheating Confessions

Video.summary: Gina separated from her husband Nate because she could never get along with his family. But Nate says that he's always had suspicions that their child wasn't really his. Then, Damond says that he doubts that he's the real father of Kendahl's child.
Video.title: DNA: It's Your Baby

Video.summary: After spending years in prison for a crime he says he did not commit, Sontay accuses his ex-girlfriend's family of setting him up.
Video.title: Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?

Image.alt: Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?
Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?
Did I Spend 4 Years in Prison Because of a Lie?

Video.summary: Chante’s daughter accused Danae of sexual abuse. Although Danae was cleared by the authorities, Chante’s mother Shelly never believed her innocence. But is Danae just covering up for her own lies? Did Chante’s mother sleep with her ex-husband?
Video.title: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Image.alt: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Video.summary: Anthony believes his ex, Erica and her new boyfriend Jeremy are abusing his son. Next, Lacey is being accused, by her aunt, of physically abusing and neglecting her two young children.
Video.title: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Video.summary: Buddy’s a high school dropout who spends his days getting high and playing videos games, rather than providing for his family. His girlfriend Holly works to provide for everyone while also taking care of their special needs child, but is fed up!
Video.title: Steve and the Stoner

Video.summary: Debbie is concerned that her daughter, Heather, is so preoccupied with breaking up her relationship, that she is neglecting her children. Plus, Stephen is here because he's concerned that his daughters are being abused by his ex-wife's boyfriend.
Video.title: Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Image.alt: Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Video.summary: Noah and Kendra had a yearlong fling, but when he finally visited her, she had a baby and claimed he was the father! Marvin and Rainy have been married for almost 6 years, but two weeks ago, she received a call saying that Marvin had cheated on her!
Video.title: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Image.alt: You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby
You're Not the Father, I Borrowed a Baby

Video.summary: Antoinette says her boyfriend is crazy because he is constantly accusing her of cheating. She says she cheated in the past, but she hasn't since.
Video.title: Lie Detector Drama

Video.summary: Alexus says she has had enough of her boyfriend spitting on her and hitting her; Antonio accuses his partner of cheating with everyone, from random men to his friends and family members.
Video.title: How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?

Image.alt: How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?
How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?
How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?

Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death

Video.summary: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.
Video.title: I Am Not A Stalker

Video.summary: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.
Video.title: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Image.alt: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Video.summary: Emotions are high in this intense story about a young girl allegedly being stalked by her molester. But when the results are read, the truth is not what it seemed.
Video.title: You Better Hope You Passed

Video.summary: Eric and Lisa are divorced and Eric is now dating Keri. Both Eric and Keri feel like Lisa is stalking them by sending him text messages and naked pictures. Then, Christopher has been unable to trust Olivia and thinks she may be cheating again.
Video.title: She's Stalking Us!

Video.summary: Brandon spent time in jail after being accused of sexually abusing his niece. He maintains his innocence and claims that this isn’t the first time his niece has accused someone of molestation! Was she coached by his sister’s boyfriend Billy?
Video.title: Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Image.alt: Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Video.summary: Michael and Flora are no longer dating, but they have a 3 year old daughter together. Michael thinks that Flora’s boyfriend Dwayne is abusing his daughter, but is he telling the truth? Watch Steve get to the bottom of this!
Video.title: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Image.alt: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Video.summary: Nicole thinks Sean openly cheats on her, but she's the one who gets the positive test result; Imani sports the promise ring from Charles, but she may have to return it after contracting a sexually transmitted disease.
Video.title: You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess

Image.alt: You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess
You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess
You Caught an S.T.D. Just Confess

Video.summary: After breaking up, Janell gave birth to their second child, but does not allow Rolando to be alone with the child because she believes that he abused their first baby. Then, Kayla is 14 years old and pregnant with Garret's child.
Video.title: Too Young to Be Parents

Video.summary: Keith has been accused of touching his 3-year-old son inappropriately by Crystal, the mother of his children, which he strongly denies. He says this is the result of her anger over an affair he had. But will the lie detector test prove him right?
Video.title: I Stand Accused

Video.summary: Sabrina’s grandkids were under state custody 3 different times due to reports of neglect, physical and sexual abuse. Their dad refuses to let them near her. Next, Rose saw 2nd degree burns on her son. Did his step-mom Alecia intentionally burn him?
Video.title: My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother

Image.alt: My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother
My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother
My Daughter Is a Worthless Mother

Video.summary: Today on Steve Wilkos, Steven is desperate to find out who is the real father of his 3 year old son. He found out that his ex, Shannon, was intimate with 3 of his best friends when she got pregnant.
Video.title: Angry Dad Demands DNA

Video.summary: Police informed Latoya that her husband was accused of molesting her daughter. She immediately kicked him out, but feels torn. Then, Jesenia suspects her ex Melvin molested their daughter, but Melvin maintains his innocence!
Video.title: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Image.alt: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Video.summary: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating; Jim denies having sex with his fiancee's sister and underage girls.
Video.title: I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Image.alt: I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Video.summary: Elaina and her husband Lennard claim their daughter was raped by her brother-in-law Lenel. Lenel’s fiancée and Elaina’s sister, Elissa, believes they’re making up this entire story. Don’t miss the shocking results today!
Video.title: Justice Will Be Served Today

Video.summary: Derrick wants to know whether he is the father of his ex-wife's 3-year-old daughter; Aisia admits to sleeping with two men around the time her second child was conceived, and now her ex wants to know if he is her first child's father.
Video.title: Devastating DNA

Video.summary: Perry and Stephanie started having an affair while Ashley was at rehab. Now Ashley is here to confront Perry for not taking responsibility for their daughter. Then, after they split up, Amanda started accusing James' new girlfriend of being abusive.
Video.title: Angry Moms Confront

Video.summary: Javon, 17, has two children with his girlfriend, but he suspects he might not be the biological father; Vandalina fears that her other son is in the same situation.
Video.title: I'm In High School And I Need A DNA Test

Image.alt: I'm In High School And I Need A DNA Test
I'm In High School And I Need A DNA Test
I'm In High School And I Need A DNA Test

Video.summary: Amanda is here because she's trying to save her marriage to Bo. Bo's not sure if he's the father of her child and needs a DNA test to prove the truth. Plus, Julie says that she believes she's being cheated on by Stevie.
Video.title: I Need Answers Now

Video.summary: Elisha is claiming to be pregnant with John's baby, but Elisha's friend Brittany claims that she made up the pregnancy to keep John from breaking up with her. Then, during her pregnancy, Linzy contracted an STD and believes that Alex gave it to her.
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Video.summary: Adrianna says her ex-fiancé is verbally and physically abusive, but he says he had every right to treat her that way to put her in her place.
Video.title: She Deserves It
